notes: when you start a level the loading screen never goes away, so it seems the level starts, and you can hear things happening but all you can see is the loading screen.
title: Urban Chaos

gpu: X.Org Gallium 0.4 on AMD JUNIPER (DRM 2.43.0 / 4.4.0-144-generic, LLVM 3.8.0)
notes: Works as well as its age would allow; i.e. Issues are specific to the game itself. Trying to run it in any other Proton version causes it to get stuck when loading levels. Applied widescreen patch and "60 fps" tweak from PCGamingWiki with no additional problems. Did not test controller support nor forcing windowed mod.
title: Urban Chaos
